description:
What is the biggest encroachment into this formation, and how big is it?

Thanks to Spica for the main variations.
sgf:
(;GM[1]FF[4]CA[UTF-8]AP[CGoban:2]ST[2]

;B[ec]CR[ec]C[RIGHT You won by 1. 1st move 1 space jump (1sj) was 1 point bigger than saving the 18 point capture, and 2 points bigger than the next 
best move. Also, when White does not respond locally to 1sj, the biggest follow-up into this formation is a 2nd 1sj. After W plays J10, F9 is the key 
point for both. If W chooses to capture before playing D10, this is the only sequence that allows a B win.])
